name: s-shahzad-portfolio
description: Azhad Shahzad Shaik portfolio — backend and security engineering work.
author: Azhad Shahzad Shaik <azhadshahzads@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.image:webp: python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open('assets/screenshots/assets/profile-hero.jpg'); img.convert('RGB').save('assets/screenshots/assets/profile-hero.webp', 'WebP', quality=80, method=6)"
scripts.image:mobile: python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open('assets/screenshots/assets/profile-hero.jpg'); img.thumbnail((500,500)); img.convert('RGB').save('assets/screenshots/assets/profile-hero-mobile.webp', 'WebP', quality=80, method=6)"
scripts.images: npm run image:webp && npm run image:mobile
